input.title: Product search filters
input.requirement: As a shopper, I want to filter product search results by category, price, and availability so that I can find relevant items quickly.
input.acceptance_criteria: Filters can be combined. Empty results show a helpful message. Clearing filters restores the original result set.
input.api_notes: GET /api/products/search supports query, category, minPrice, maxPrice, and inStock query parameters.
